description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a gable roof clad in light wood panels and accented by natural wood trim. The front facade is dominated by large, floor-to-ceiling glass panels, providing a clear view into the interior, which includes potted plants and wooden flooring. One side of the roof has a prominent black-framed rectangular window, adding architectural interest and natural light to the space. The rear of the bungalow is more private, with solid wood paneling and a single wooden door for entry. The side elevations are simple, with horizontal wood siding and no additional windows or doors. The overall structure is compact, single-story, and designed for efficient urban living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, large glass front panels, and natural wood accents. Features include a prominent roof window and a private rear entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass panels, wood trim, and a roof window.
description_view_1: Side gable view with the roof window visible and glass wall below.
description_view_2: Rear view with solid wood paneling and a single wooden door.
description_view_3: Opposite gable side, plain with no windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front glass panels and a single roof window
